description: Calculate the directional trend of urbanization in Japan using the Standard Deviational Ellipse algorithm. Using the populated places dataset at /home/ga/GIS_Data/natural_earth/ne_110m_populated_places_simple.shp, analyze cities where the country ('adm0name') is 'Japan'. Apply 1 standard deviation and use the 'pop_max' field for weighting to account for city size. Export the result as a GeoJSON file to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/japan_urban_trend.geojson in WGS 84 (EPSG:4326) format.
